title: Greek Pastitsio Bake
description: A classic Greek pasta bake dish made with ground beef and topped with a creamy bechamel sauce.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Brown the ground beef in a pan over medium-high heat. Drain excess fat.
Add diced papelon to the pan and cook until softened.
Stir in crushed pastitsio and cook for 1 minute.
Add beef broth to the pan and bring to a simmer.
In a separate saucepan, melt butter over medium heat.
Add milk and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and stir in Parmesan and Feta cheese until melted.
Combine cooked pasta, meat sauce, and bechamel sauce in a large bowl.
Transfer mixture to a baking dish and top with additional Feta cheese.
Bake in preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
